title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
summary: Robinhood is filing confidentially for its second venture fund, targeting both growth-stage and early-stage startups. The filing reflects investor appetite for venture investments amid an AI-driven market rally.
content: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth as well as early-stage startups.

zh.title: 乘AI热潮，罗宾汉准备第二只零售风险基金IPO
zh.summary: 罗宾汉正在秘密申报第二只风险基金，目标是成长期和初期初创公司。该申报反映了在AI驱动市场反弹中投资者对创投的热情。
